other_observers: Found by Glenn Walbek: Maggie Boswell, John Drummond and Matt Hofeditz with me.
description: A middle-sized woodpecker with a black and white striped back. The head was a tan color with an obvious yellow patch on the back of the head. The bill was quite long and black. The chest was also a tan color. I didn't see any yellow on the lower belly: either I was never in a position to see it, or it might indicate that it was a young bird born this summer. When it flew, it had an obvious white rump.
